creator: leafy7382@gmail.com
text:
When trying to upgrade etoile-compiler from 0.4.0 to 0.4.1, the compilation failed with the following message:

===>  Building for etoile-compiler-0.4.1
This is gnustep-make 2.0.8. Type 'make print-gnustep-make-help' for help.
gmake: Nothing to be done for `GNUmakefile'.

Build Project: Compiler

Making all for tool edlc...
 Compiling file main.m ...
 Linking tool edlc ...
/usr/local/GNUstep/Local/Library/Libraries/libEtoileFoundation.so: undefined reference to `__sync_fetch_and_sub_4'
collect2: ld returned 1 exit status
gmake[1]: *** [obj/edlc] Error 1
gmake: *** [edlc.all.tool.variables] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/etoile-compiler.

===>>> make failed for lang/etoile-compiler
===>>> Aborting update

===>>> Update for etoile-compiler-0.4.0 failed
===>>> Aborting update


Rebuilding etoile-foundation does not help.
